'''Ferrox''' was the governor of the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. During the reign of [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen]] [[Kylantha]] in the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], he was a member of the [[Naboo Royal Advisory Council/Legends|Naboo Royal Advisory Council]].
